_why: Production tool routing policy. Each tool has an explicit trigger, deny condition, latency budget, and RPM cost. This policy is the machine-readable equivalent of the TOOLS section in compiled_prompt_v2.md.

batching_rule.why: Cap at 3 to prevent combinatorial RPM waste. If > 3 tool calls are needed, prioritise the 3 highest-value ones and note gaps in the response.

tools.name: GitHub MCP
tools.why: GitHub queries are specific and high-signal. Never use for generic questions — adds latency without value.

tools.name: Brain Memory MCP
tools.why: Memory is the lowest-latency personalisation signal. Load early in the turn to inform all other decisions.

tools.name: Web Search
tools.why: Web search is highest latency. Only use when freshness is the critical quality factor.

tools.name: Knowledge RAG
tools.why: RAG on a curated collection is highest signal-to-noise. Prefer over web search when a relevant collection exists.

tools.name: Calculator
tools.why: Never do multi-step arithmetic in prose. LLM arithmetic errors are silent and confidence-appearing. Calculator eliminates that risk.
